name: Methuselah
oracleText:
Vigilance
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control.
Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it dies, scry 1.
flavorText: "And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years: and he died." — Genesis 5:27
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses a reusable Wikimedia Commons Medhurst illustration of Adam's descendants from Genesis 5.
title: Elder of the Long Years
